title: Preon
description:
A [sine]void of nothingness[/sine].

But then, the world came into existence!
It churned about and molded itself to “That which tells stories.” Along this journey lay a planet named [green]Preon[/green], a mere speck in this universe. They say that a great story about a [gold]Spire[/gold] took place there.
description_zh:
一片[sine]空洞的虚无[/sine]。

可是然后，世界出现而存在了！
它翻腾着，将自己改造成了“能诉说故事的存在”。过程之中，有一颗名为[green]先子星[/green]的行星，那只是宇宙中的一粒微尘。人们说着，这里发生过一个关于[gold]高塔[/gold]的伟大故事。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。

title: Scribbles
description:
On this quiet planet, [gold]Beasts of Imagination[/gold] began to dot the world.

They roam the lands in this time of simple, gleeful violence. Countless ways to kill, to feed, and proliferate are [sine]suggested[/sine]. Colonies, hives, groups, and schools ebb and flow into the nooks and crannies of [orange]Preon[/orange].
description_zh:
在这颗安静的行星上，[gold]想象之兽[/gold]开始星星点点地出现。

它们在这单纯而快乐的暴力时代四处游荡。通过[sine]暗示[/sine]，它们知晓了无数杀戮、进食与繁衍的方法。领地、组织、巢穴与群体纷纷兴盛发达，充斥了[orange]先子星[/orange]的每一个角落。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。

title: The Architect
description:
Too many [gold]Beasts of Imagination[/gold] began to populate [orange]Preon[/orange] and things aren’t simple and fun anymore. The creatures didn’t make sense. The monsters don’t follow logic.
[sine]Maybe[/sine] there needs to be one which can create, destroy, and control this mess? An entity with its own imagination and will?

Let’s [sine]Imagine[/sine] such a being.
description_zh:
有太多[gold]想象之兽[/gold]开始在[orange]先子星[/orange]上繁衍，于是一切不再单纯和有趣。这些生物们完全不合理，怪物们的行动不合逻辑。
[sine]或许[/sine]还是需要有一个可以创造、摧毁和控制这些混乱的存在？一个自己拥有想象力与意志的实体？

让我们来[sine]想象[/sine]出这么一个存在吧。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。

title: Nemesis
description:
Ghastly nightmares of [sine][purple]tormented souls[/purple][/sine] stalk the [green]Foglands[/green].

She takes it upon herself to hunt the haunter. Once the hunt is complete, its skull is ceremoniously placed upon her by her [green]Sisters[/green]. The ritual has concluded.
description_zh:
[sine][purple]苦痛灵魂们[/purple][/sine]化身而成的梦魇幽魂在[green]雾霾之地[/green]潜伏游荡。

她下定决心要狩猎那个可怕的鬼魂。狩猎完成之后，她的[green]姐妹们[/green]将它的头骨郑重地戴在她的头上。仪式完成了。
unlock_info: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [red]Bosses[/red] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[green]静默猎手[/green]击杀[blue]15[/blue]个[red]Boss[/red]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Seeds
description:
Enamored by the growth and stability of flora and fauna, the [red]Architect[/red] spends decades researching and refining them... And so, at last, the penultimate creation— [gold]“The Ancient Seeds”[/gold] are complete!

The seeds which turned out to be failures, [purple]“The Mistakes”[/purple], were placed in a heavy coffer and hurled into the ocean’s depths.
description_zh:
[red]建筑师[/red]醉心于动植物们的成长与稳定，不惜花费数十年的时间对它们进行研究和改善……于是最终，造物史中倒数第二次的造物——[gold]“先古种子”[/gold]完成了！

然而这些种子最终却是失败品，被称为[purple]“错误”[/purple]，于是它们被放进一口沉重的箱子、扔进了海底。
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] three times to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 通关[blue]第三[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]三次来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked game mode: Custom.
unlock_text_zh: 解锁游戏模式：自定义。

title: Elsewhere
description: This is another placeholder... this story is unknown while you are viewing this Epoch during an Early Access stage...
description_zh: 这是另一段占位文本……当你在抢先体验期间查看这个历史节点时，这段故事还无从知晓……
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。
unlock_text: It is not yet known what this unlocked...
unlock_text_zh: 还不知道这会解锁什么……

title: Ancients
description:
The [green]Ancient Trees[/green] are not all the same. Each individual tree is shaped by its surroundings. Some are stout and bushy while others are gnarled and knotted.

When fully mature, a manifestation of its immense power is born within.

An [gold]Ancient[/gold].
description_zh:
[green]先古之树[/green]并非整齐划一。每一棵树都是由周围的环境塑造：有些壮实而茂密，有些扭曲而虬结。

当树木完全成熟时，其中就孕育出其巨大力量的一个化身。

一个[gold]先古之民[/gold]。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。

title: Traitors
description:
One of the many Ancients, [blue]Neow[/blue], grew jealous of the awe-inspiring will of the [red]Architect[/red].

She confided with a like-minded sibling and together they created a most potent concoction.
[purple]The Blight[/purple].
description_zh:
在众多先古之民中有一个，名叫[blue]涅奥[/blue]的，开始嫉妒起[red]建筑师[/red]那令人畏惧的意志。

她将事情告诉了一位想法相同的同胞，然后他们两个在一起创造出了一种最强力的混合物。
[purple]荒疫[/purple]。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。

title: The Pact
description: For centuries, war raged between the [red]Ironclads[/red] and the [blue]Valleyguard[/blue]. Driven by ambition, a young ironclad ventures to the forbidden boundary and bargains with the sacred [jitter]“Demon”[/jitter].
description_zh: 数百年来，[red]铁甲军团[/red]与[blue]河谷卫士[/blue]之间一直征战不休。一名年轻的铁甲战士怀着远大的抱负，前往禁忌的分界线，与神圣的[jitter]“恶魔”[/jitter]进行了交易。
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[red]铁甲战士[/red]通关[blue]第三[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked [red]Ascension[/red] for the [red]Ironclad[/red] and [gold]Blood Potion[/gold], [gold]Soldier's Stew[/gold], and [gold]Ashwater[/gold].
unlock_text_zh: 为[red]铁甲战士[/red]解锁[red]进阶难度[/red]。同时解锁[gold]鲜血药水[/gold]、[gold]士兵炖汤[/gold]和[gold]灰水[/gold]。

title: Devastation
description:
[jitter]The [red]Ironclad’s[/red] strength surges![/jitter]

The flames of the Demonic pact course through his blood. Cuts and bruises heal rapidly. The [blue]Valleyguard[/blue] are cleaved in two, the [orange]Desert Tribe[/orange] are burned to a crisp, [green]Wind Walkers[/green] [jitter]smashed[/jitter] into the ground, and even a familiar horde of aggressive bronze-cladded warriors are set ablaze with these [sine]exciting new flames[/sine]!

All of the Ironclad’s enemies are shown no mercy. All of the Ironclads... Ironclad?
...where is everyone?
description_zh:
[jitter][red]铁甲战士[/red]的力量突然暴增！[/jitter]

恶魔契约的火焰在他的血液中穿行。淤伤与切割的伤口飞快地愈合着。[blue]河谷卫士[/blue]们被一刀两断、[orange]沙漠部落[/orange]被烧成灰烬、[green]驭风行者[/green]们被狠狠[jitter]砸[/jitter]进了地面，就连一群有些熟悉的、穿戴着铜质铠甲的好斗战士们，也被这些[sine]令人兴奋的全新火焰[/sine]给焚烧了！

所有铁甲军团的敌人都没有得到丝毫的怜悯。所有铁甲军团……铁甲军团？
……大家都在哪里呢？
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[red]铁甲战士[/red]通关[blue]第二[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Somewhere
description: This is a placeholder... this story is unknown while you are viewing this Epoch during an Early Access stage...
description_zh: 这是占位文本……当你在抢先体验期间查看这个历史节点时，这段故事还无从知晓……
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。
unlock_text: It is not yet known what this unlocked...
unlock_text_zh: 还不知道这会解锁什么……

title: Slumber
description:
Neow excitedly presented the [red]Architect[/red] with a potent [purple]tea[/purple] she had been working on since his prior visit.

[sine]“This... will help... ..you sleep.....”[/sine]
description_zh:
涅奥兴奋地给[red]建筑师[/red]递上了一杯从他上次来访后就一直在调配的强效[purple]茶水[/purple]。

[sine]“这能... 帮你... ..安睡.....”[/sine]
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。

title: Consequences
description:
The [purple]Blight[/purple] takes hold of the comatose [red]Architect[/red] and its poison amplifies! It forms a symbiotic relationship with Neow’s Tree and it [sine]hungered[/sine] to grow and grow.

The other Ancients capture the culprit as the [purple]Blight[/purple] ravages the land. They imprison [blue]Neow[/blue] and take shelter from the now unstoppable [purple]Blight[/purple].
description_zh:
[purple]荒疫[/purple]占据了昏迷的[red]建筑师[/red]，它的毒性陡然增强！它与涅奥的树结成了共生关系，让树[sine]饥饿[/sine]、不断地生长与成长。

[purple]荒疫[/purple]破坏着整片大地，其他先古之民们控制住了犯人，他们将[blue]涅奥[/blue]囚禁起来，然后藏身躲避那场已经无可阻挡的[purple]荒疫[/purple]。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。

title: The Spire
description:
Its roots no longer able to draw nourishment from [orange]Preon[/orange], the [gold]Ancient Trees[/gold] began to wither and die... the once beautiful forests surrender to the weight of eternity.

Even Neow’s Tree loses its branches and lush foliage. The last tree is no tree at all.
They give it a name.
description_zh:
[gold]先古之树[/gold]的根须无法再从[orange]先子星[/orange]中汲取养分，开始逐渐枯萎和死亡……曾经美丽的森林在永恒的重压之下溃不成军。

就连涅奥的树也失去了枝条与繁茂的树叶。最后的这棵树，已经完全失去了树的样子。
他们给它起了个名字。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。
unlock_text: Unlocked event: [blue]Colorful Philosophers[/blue].
unlock_text_zh: 解锁事件：[blue]色彩哲学家[/blue]。

title: The Ironclad
description:
[red]The Ironclad.[/red] A warrior from a faraway land entered the [gold]Spire[/gold].
Driven by pure instinct and accursed blood, he has lost all reason and identity.

All who prevent his ascent shall perish.
description_zh:
[red]铁甲战士。[/red]一名来自遥远他方的战士进入了[gold]高塔[/gold]。
他已经失去了所有的理性与自我，凭借着纯粹的本能与被诅咒的血而行动。

所有阻挡他攀登的存在都将灭亡。
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[red]铁甲战士[/red]通关[blue]第一[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Buy Something!
description:
Currency was invented!
Desperate times call for desperate measures... and desperate measures cost [gold]Gold[/gold]! Spend that [gold]Gold[/gold] to acquire a morsel of food, the sharpest of daggers, or a fashionable hat!! Buy something! Approach any [blue]blue-clothed merchant[/blue] on a [green]green rug[/green], and you'll be treated to a fantastic shopping experience. We don't turn away anybody!

(Disclaimer: This Epoch description was paid for by Merchant)
description_zh:
现金被发明了出来！
非常时刻需要非常手段……而非常手段需要花费[gold]金币[/gold]！花费那些[gold]金币[/gold]来换取一餐食物、最锋利的匕首、或是最时尚的帽子！！买点什么吧！见到坐在[green]绿色毯子[/green]上的[blue]蓝衣商人[/blue]就大胆上前，你就将获得一次难忘的购物体验。我们从不拒绝任何人！

（声明：本段历史节点说明由商人出资提供）
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。

title: Trophies
description: Fantastic trophies occupy this forsaken place. All were defeated, one by one. Those marked by the Silent always fall.
description_zh: 这个被诅咒的地方摆满了无数奇异的战利品。每一只生物都被一一打败。毕竟，被静默猎手标记的猎物，一定会倒下。
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[green]静默猎手[/green]通关[blue]第三[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked [red]Ascension[/red] for the [green]Silent[/green] and [gold]Poison Potion[/gold], [gold]Ghost in a Jar[/gold], and [gold]Cunning Potion[/gold].
unlock_text_zh: 为[green]静默猎手[/green]解锁[red]进阶难度[/red]。同时解锁[gold]毒药水[/gold]、[gold]罐装幽灵[/gold]和[gold]狡诈药水[/gold]。

title: Poisoner
description:
Another hunt concludes.

Stilling the putrid Heart with a [sine]special-made poison[/sine], the [green]Silent[/green] rappels upwards and outwards and longs to bathe in the comforting moonlight. She leaves the [gold]Spire[/gold] with a prize in hand. A piece of the [purple]Heart[/purple].
description_zh:
另一场狩猎完成了。

[green]静默猎手[/green]用[sine]专门调配的毒液[/sine]让腐化的心脏停止了跳动。她用钩索向上腾跃，翻出了塔外，沐浴在令人安心的月光之下。她离开了[gold]高塔[/gold]，手中握着战利品：一块[purple]心脏[/purple]的碎片。
unlock_info: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[green]静默猎手[/green]杀死[blue]15[/blue]个[purple]精英[/purple]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Laser Beams
description:
The [blue]Defect[/blue] punctured the [purple]Heart[/purple] with a magnificently charged [jitter]BEEEAAAAM!![/jitter]

Mission accomplished...?
Damage Sustained: [red]<CRITICAL>[/red]

Next Objective:
Relocate to [orange]Scrapyard[/orange] for evaluation.
description_zh:
[blue]故障机器人[/blue]用超量充能的[jitter]巨大光束[/jitter]射穿了[purple]心脏[/purple]！！

任务完成……？
已承受伤害：[red]<临界>[/red]

下一目标：
前往[orange]废料场[/orange]进行评估。
unlock_info: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [red]Bosses[/red] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[blue]故障机器人[/blue]击杀[blue]15[/blue]个[red]Boss[/red]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Ablaze
description:
The [red]Ironclad[/red] slays the [purple]Heart[/purple] with its full might... and the Demon's Contract hungrily absorbs the [purple]Blight[/purple] unto itself.

Immediately, the warrior and [purple]Blight[/purple] are set ablaze. The parasite is drawn into the flame, its writhing form consumed like wax wicking into a fire.
description_zh:
[red]铁甲战士[/red]斩杀了力量处于全盛的[purple]心脏[/purple]……恶魔的契约饥渴地将[purple]荒疫[/purple]吸收到了自己身上。

一瞬间，战士与[purple]荒疫[/purple]都被火焰点燃。寄生虫被吸引到了火光之中，挣扎扭曲着，如同蜡滴坠入火焰般被吞噬殆尽。
unlock_info: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[red]铁甲战士[/red]击杀[blue]15[/blue]个[purple]精英[/purple]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: The Calm
description:
The [purple]Blight[/purple] stopped consuming.

The ground, dry and brittle- begins to moisten. The clouds around the [gold]Spire[/gold] douse the lands. The sunlight pierces through newly formed cracks in the clouds.

It has been done. Someone had slain the Spire.
description_zh:
[purple]荒疫[/purple]停止了吞噬。

干涸而脆弱的土地开始重新湿润，[gold]高塔[/gold]周围的云层浇灌着土壤，阳光从云层间新出现的缝隙中洒落下来。

事已成了。有人杀死了高塔。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。

title: Bigger Prey
description:
The other sisters judge the fourth one in silence...
 They have not seen her for over [blue]three centuries[/blue] and she returns with an [jitter][purple]ugly[/purple][/jitter] [sine][blue]pulsating[/blue][/sine] [red]scrap[/red].

[green]The Silent[/green] recollects the trials she endured for this trophy but does not speak; to speak is weak. One can only prove herself with more impressive trophies.

There is always bigger prey.
description_zh:
另几个姐妹们静默地审视着第四位姐妹……
 她们已经有[blue]三个世纪[/blue]多没有见到她了，而后者带回来的只是一块[jitter][purple]丑陋的[/purple][/jitter]、[sine][blue]搏动着的[/blue][/sine][red]碎片[/red]。

[green]静默猎手[/green]回忆起在获取这个战利品的途中自己经历的无数考验，但她始终没有开口——开口是一种弱小。要证明自己，始终只能靠更加辉煌的战利品。

总是会有更大的猎物。
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[green]静默猎手[/green]通关[blue]第一[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Orobas
description:
Attracted by the now burning Spire, Orobas’ curiosity was piqued.

“Blight gone!! Why gone! Safe to enter!? Orobas enters!!!”
description_zh:
欧洛巴斯的好奇心被燃烧起来的高塔所吸引。

“荒疫消失！！为何消失！进入安全！？欧洛巴斯要进去！！！”
unlock_info: Play a run with every character to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以所有角色完成一局游戏来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked Ancient: [aqua]Orobas[/aqua].
unlock_text_zh: 解锁先古之民：[aqua]欧洛巴斯[/aqua]。

title: Cultists
description:
[jitter]“Caw... Caw caw!!”[/jitter]
Such a humiliating defeat... their places of worship and sacrifices desecrated over and over by ruinous invaders.

Has [blue]Mazaleth[/blue] forsaken us?

Food within the [gold]Spire[/gold] has become scarce as the bug population surges. The [blue]Flock[/blue] escape to the lower rungs of the [gold]Spire[/gold] and scrape by on [green][sine]seaweed[/sine][/green] and [purple][jitter]sewer critters[/jitter][/purple].
description_zh:
[jitter]“咔……咔咔！！”[/jitter]
如此耻辱的败北……他们的礼拜与献祭之地被可恶的入侵者们一次又一次地毁坏与亵渎。

难道[blue]马萨雷斯[/blue]抛弃了我们吗？

随着虫群的数量激增，[gold]高塔[/gold]中的食物已经变得稀少。[blue]信徒们[/blue]逃向了[gold]高塔[/gold]的底层，靠着吃[green][sine]海藻[/sine][/green]与[purple][jitter]下水道动物[/jitter][/purple]来维生。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。
unlock_text: Unlocked event: [blue]Trash Heap[/blue].
unlock_text_zh: 解锁事件：[blue]垃圾堆[/blue]。

title: Arise
description:
The [red]Architect[/red] wakes up from the longest of slumbers; the sleep was poor.

Memories return in fragments and his surroundings are alien.
He is not who he once was.
description_zh:
[red]建筑师[/red]从最为漫长的沉睡中苏醒，那场睡眠并不安稳。

回忆的碎片逐渐归来，可是周遭的一切却无比陌生。
他已不再是曾经的自己。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。

title: Discontent
description:
On his home planet, the Regent proclaims to be the heir to the Sun and decides that all the other planets must know!

“Why do you wish for this, Regent? We have everything we need! We needn't eat, we have peace, we cannot die, and we are fashionable!” a fellow [orange]Starrian[/orange] pleads.

[jitter]“You are BORING!”[/jitter]
description_zh:
储君在自己故乡的星球上，宣称自己是太阳的继承者，并且认定其他行星一定需要知道这个重大消息！

“您这是想要做什么呀，储君？我们这里有自己需要的一切啊！我们不用吃喝、拥有和平、永生不死、而且还很有时尚品味！”一个[orange]星国[/orange]同胞试图说服他。

[jitter]“你太[b]无聊[/b]了！”[/jitter]
unlock_info: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [red]Bosses[/red] with the [orange]Regent[/orange] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[orange]储君[/orange]击杀[blue]15[/blue]个[red]Boss[/red]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Hello! Hello!
description:
In the [orange]Scrapyard[/orange] the [blue]Defect[/blue] pondered its fate and purpose.

[sine]Is being okay at a host of functions not desirable? Do we all need to excel at a distinct function?[/sine] While processing these questions—

“Hello!” pops out another construct.
“Hello!” [blue]Defect[/blue] responds.
“My name is [aqua]Flaw[/aqua]!”
description_zh:
[blue]故障机器人[/blue]在[orange]废料场[/orange]思考着自己的命运与目的。

[sine]接受自己只是一系列功能的搭载体，这是否不可取呢？是否我们全体都需要在某个特定的功能上做到优秀呢？[/sine]正在处理这些问题的时候——

“你好！”另一个构装体出现在面前。
“你好！” [blue]故障机器人[/blue]回答道。
“你可以叫我[aqua]缺陷机器人[/aqua]！”
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[blue]故障机器人[/blue]通关[blue]第二[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Civilization
description:
Societies and cultures from around the world make a pilgrimage to the Spire as it becomes the trading hub of the world.

Slowly, a burgeoning metropolis began to form at its base.
description_zh:
高塔成为了整个世界的贸易枢纽，全世界的无数社会与文化都前来这里朝圣。

渐渐地，一个高速发展的大都会开始在塔底出现。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。

title: Resolving Bugs
description:
[blue]Defect[/blue] and [aqua]Flaw[/aqua] fast became friends and exited the [orange]Scrapyard[/orange]; it was sad there.

They return to the [gold]Spire’s[/gold] mid floors and are met with a [jitter]MASSIVE BUG INFESTATION[/jitter]!!
The pair get to work in an attempt to reduce the bugs to a reasonable level.
description_zh:
[blue]故障机器人[/blue]和[aqua]缺陷机器人[/aqua]很快成为了朋友，它们离开了[orange]废料场[/orange]，毕竟那里有太多悲伤。

它们回到了[gold]高塔[/gold]的中间楼层，结果遭遇了[jitter]一大群害虫[/jitter]！！
两个机器人开始了工作，试图将虫子的数量控制到可接受的范围内。
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[blue]故障机器人[/blue]通关[blue]第三[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked [red]Ascension[/red] for the [blue]Defect[/blue] and [gold]Focus Potion[/gold], [gold]Essence of Darkness[/gold], and [gold]Potion of Capacity[/gold].
unlock_text_zh: 解锁[blue]故障机器人[/blue]的[red]进阶难度[/red]。同时解锁[gold]集中药水[/gold]、[gold]黑暗精华[/gold]和[gold]扩容药水[/gold]。

title: Anomalous Planet
description:
His Majesty barely even looked anymore and swiped through planet profiles in the current constellation. “I DEMAND to visit a more exciting planet!”
[orange]The Regent[/orange] slammed his fists down on the space console—
[jitter][red]*BEEP BEEP BEEP*[/red][/jitter]
[jitter]Anomalous Planet Detected![/jitter]
description_zh:
殿下甚至不再用心去看当前星图中的那些行星档案，只是一味地将它们划掉。“我[b]强烈要求[/b]能去造访一个更加刺激的行星！”
[orange]储君[/orange]双拳狠狠砸在了太空控制台上——
[jitter][red]*嘀 嘀 嘀*[/red][/jitter]
[jitter]检测到异常行星！[/jitter]
unlock_info: Play a run with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[green]静默猎手[/green]完成一局游戏来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked the [orange]Regent[/orange] as a playable character.
unlock_text_zh: 解锁[orange]储君[/orange]成为一名可玩角色。

title: Ill
description:
A sickness carrying a [sine]familiar scent[/sine] courses through the [green]Silent’s[/green] veins, the [purple]Heart piece[/purple] is slowly killing her!
The [purple]grotesque trophy[/purple] is hurled into the ocean, but the blight has no cure.

She will die soon.
description_zh:
[green]静默猎手[/green]的血管中流淌着一种有着[sine]熟悉气味[/sine]的疾病。是那块[purple]心脏碎片[/purple]正在慢慢杀死她！
那件[purple]古怪的战利品[/purple]已经被扔进了海里，但是荒疫并不存在解药。

她很快就会死去。
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[green]静默猎手[/green]通关[blue]第二[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Snuffed
description:
It is said that a never ceasing flame atop the [gold]Spire[/gold] burns proudly. Proven by the neighboring clouds glowing a gentle violet through the darkest winter nights.

Then one day, the clouds were normal.
The [purple]flame[/purple] went out.
description_zh:
传闻说，[gold]高塔[/gold]顶端有着永不停息的火焰，高傲地燃烧着。这并非妄言，因为即使在最寒冷的冬夜，那里附近的云层依旧会被照亮、映照出淡淡的紫罗兰色，证实着传闻的真实性。

然后有一天，云层恢复了正常。
[purple]火焰[/purple]熄灭了。
unlock_info: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [red]Bosses[/red] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[red]铁甲战士[/red]击杀[blue]15[/blue]个[red]Boss[/red]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Friends
description:
His Majesty attempted to make friends. Literally.

They're quite sturdy and decent at following instructions. They're terrible at chess and enjoy pop music. The minions were swiftly demoted from “Friend” to “Minion”.
[sine]Sigh...[/sine]
description_zh:
殿下决定自己需要一些朋友，所以就亲手做了一些。

它们相当结实，也还算能够听话执行命令，但同时它们下棋很烂、还喜欢听流行音乐。于是它们很快就从“朋友”被贬职到了“仆从”。
[sine]唉...[/sine]
unlock_info: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [orange]Regent[/orange] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[orange]储君[/orange]击杀[blue]15[/blue]个[purple]精英[/purple]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Confrontation
description:
They confronted the source of the worst bugs:
[sine][purple]A toxic wasp colony residing in triangular nests.[/purple][/sine]

[jitter][blue]PYEEEEWWWW!![/blue][/jitter]

The [blue]Defect[/blue] empties its energy reserves and tears the hexapolis wide open!
The [aqua]Flaw[/aqua] fires a salvo of laser pulses to keep the [red][jitter]cloud of stinging retaliation[/jitter][/red] at bay!

It's not enough.
description_zh:
它们正直面着最可怕虫子们的源头：
[sine][purple]一个占据了众多三角形巢穴的带毒黄蜂群。[/purple][/sine]

[jitter][blue]Biu biu——！！[/blue][/jitter]

[blue]故障机器人[/blue]耗尽了能量储备，将六边形巢穴彻底撕开！
[aqua]缺陷机器人[/aqua]连发了一阵激光脉冲，压制住了[red][jitter]试图反击的蜇刺蜂团[/jitter][/red]！

可是这还不够。
unlock_info: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[blue]故障机器人[/blue]击杀[blue]15[/blue]个[purple]精英[/purple]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Open
description:
The clouds churn maliciously as [blue]The Capital[/blue] trembles beneath a storm so violent that none dare to leave their homes.

Twelve days later, the rain stops.
The clouds remain, but the [purple]Flame[/purple] has gone out.

The [gold]Spire[/gold] opens its doors once more.
description_zh:
云层不祥地翻滚着，[blue]首都[/blue]在肆虐的雷暴中颤抖着，没有人胆敢走出自己的家门。

十二天后，暴雨停止。
云层仍在，但那些[purple]火光[/purple]已然消失不见。

[gold]高塔[/gold]再一次打开了它的大门。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。

title: Neow
description:
Mother of resurrection, [blue]Neow[/blue], awakened from her slumber.

[sine]“Rise.. champion..... again. Again...”[/sine]
description_zh:
复生之母[blue]涅奥[/blue]从沉眠之中苏醒。

[sine]“起来.. 勇士..... 再一次。 再一次...”[/sine]
unlock_info: Play a single run to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 游玩一局游戏来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked the Ancient: [blue]Neow[/blue].
unlock_text_zh: 解锁先古之民：[blue]涅奥[/blue]。

title: The Twelve
description:
Who is worthy to enter the exalted Spire?
[blue]The Capital[/blue] gathers the most [purple]brilliant[/purple], [green]formidable[/green], and [red]courageous[/red] from all the lands.
Twelve explorers formed an expedition and advanced inside to make history.

None made it back.
description_zh:
谁才有资格进入显赫的高塔呢？
[blue]首都[/blue]从各地召集来了最[purple]聪明[/purple]、最[green]强大[/green]与最[red]勇敢[/red]的人们。
十二名探险者组成了一支远征队，进入高塔试图创造历史。

没有一个人回来。
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[pink]亡灵契约师[/pink]通关[blue]第一[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Fog Rolls In
description:
News of the [gold]Spire’s[/gold] reopening made its way to the [green]Silent[/green].
She ferries a boat to [blue]The Capital[/blue].
description_zh:
[gold]高塔[/gold]重新开放的消息传到了[green]静默猎手[/green]的耳中。
她撑着一支小船，向[blue]首都[/blue]出发。
unlock_info: Play a run with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[red]铁甲战士[/red]完成一局游戏来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked the [green]Silent[/green] as a playable character.
unlock_text_zh: 解锁[green]静默猎手[/green]成为一名可玩角色。

title: I Arrive
description:
[jitter]*KABOOOOM*[/jitter]

A fantastic explosion marks the arrival of the [orange]Regent[/orange]. His Majesty's spaceship shattered beyond repair.

“Finally, I arrive!”
description_zh:
[jitter]*轰隆——*[/jitter]

华丽的爆炸宣告了[orange]储君[/orange]的到来。殿下的宇宙飞船撞成了碎片，已经不可能修好了。

“终于，我已到来！”
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] with the [orange]Regent[/orange] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[orange]储君[/orange]通关[blue]第一[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: They Return
description:
The Ancients emerged from hiding and head to the [gold]Spire[/gold]...

It has been too long since they had received its blessings.
description_zh:
先古之民们纷纷不再躲藏，向着[gold]高塔[/gold]出发……

他们已经有太久没有得到过高塔的赐福了。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 通过积累分数来解锁。
unlock_text: Unlocked event: [blue]Reflections snoitcelfeR[/blue].
unlock_text_zh: 解锁事件：[blue]镜中倒影  影倒中镜[/blue]。

title: Booting Up
description:
The [blue]Defect[/blue] reboots!
Surrounded by a wreckage of [orange]molten metal[/orange], [sine][red]ash[/red][/sine], and [jitter][green]thousands of dead bugs[/green][/jitter]!?
DATA LOG: [red]<CORRUPT>[/red].

Its core barely held together, limbs barely responsive, the [blue]Defect[/blue] scavenges broken panels and pieces from other constructs to patch itself together.
description_zh:
[blue]故障机器人[/blue]重启完成！
但却发现自己身处于大量[orange]熔化金属[/orange]、[sine][red]灰烬[/red][/sine]和[jitter][green]数千只虫子尸体[/green][/jitter]之间！？
数据日志：[red]<已损坏>[/red].

它的核心几乎就要散架、四肢也只能勉强动弹。[blue]故障机器人[/blue]从其他构装体那里拆卸回收了不少损坏的金属板与零件，将自己修补了一番。
unlock_info: Play a run with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 用[pink]亡灵契约师[/pink]进行一局游戏来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked the [blue]Defect[/blue] as a playable character.
unlock_text_zh: 解锁[blue]故障机器人[/blue]成为一名可玩角色。

title: Futility
description:
[b][gold]Incident Report[/gold][/b] // [blue]Date: 2,771-??-??[/blue]
Accidentally entered a conflict between a boulder-throwing individual and flying automatons.

[b]Jacktopher Grootz (Fighter):[/b] Crushed by a boulder
[b]Jose Paxo (Fighter):[/b] Fell in a hole
[b]Big Ed (Bard):[/b] Shot by a construct
[b]Garbo Doughbee (Healer):[/b] Touched grass
[b]Temi Mondes (Arcanist):[/b] Whereabouts unknown
description_zh:
[b][gold]事件报告[/gold][/b] // [blue]日期：2,771-??-??[/blue]
意外卷入了一个投掷巨石的人与一些飞行自动机械的纷争。

[b]杰克托弗·格鲁茨（战士）：[/b] 被巨石压死
[b]何塞·帕克索（战士）：[/b] 掉进了坑里
[b]大艾德（吟游诗人）：[/b] 被一具构装体射杀
[b]嘉博·多比（治疗师）：[/b] 碰到了草
[b]特米·蒙迪斯（奥术师）：[/b] 下落不明
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[pink]亡灵契约师[/pink]通关[blue]第二[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Underdocks
description:
Once a source of [blue]clean water[/blue] for all the [gold]Spire[/gold], the [gold]Underdocks[/gold] falls into disrepair.
[red][jitter]Aggressive sea creatures[/jitter][/red] emerged from its depths, making a home in the maze-like passages.
description_zh:
[gold]暗港[/gold]曾是整个[gold]高塔[/gold]中[blue]清洁水[/blue]的一大来源，如今却已年久失修。
[red][jitter]充满敌意的海洋生物[/jitter][/red]从海底出现，在港口迷宫般的道路中居住了下来。
unlock_info: Unlock by accumulating score.
unlock_info_zh: 击杀[green]密林[/green]的全部[blue]3[/blue]个Boss来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked the [blue]Underdocks[/blue], an alternate Act 1.
unlock_text_zh: 解锁[blue]暗港[/blue]，第一阶段的一种变体。

title: We Need a Hero!
description:
Deadly monsters had begun to trickle out of the [gold]Spire[/gold] at an increasing pace ever since the Doors have reopened...

Brave warriors, explorers, and mercenaries have been sent in but few make progress.
Even fewer make it back alive.

The [orange]Regent[/orange] learns of this dismay and takes it upon himself to become the hero that Preon needs!
“I enter!!”
description_zh:
自从大门开启，致命的怪物们就开始从[gold]高塔[/gold]中不断加速涌出……

许多英勇的战士、探险者和雇佣兵们被派进高塔，却鲜有人都有所进展。
能活着回来的人只会更少。

[orange]储君[/orange]得知了这一现状，立即决定自己就应该成为先子星最需要的英雄！
“我进塔！！”
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] with the [orange]Regent[/orange] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[orange]储君[/orange]通关[blue]第二[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Tricked
description:
[blue]Neow[/blue] resurrected the defective construct, no simple feat even for an Ancient.

[sine]“Construct... what you.. ..lost....
Your [red]creator[/red]... ..abandoned you.. ...hides..... at the... ..top...”[/sine]
The [blue]Defect[/blue] thanks [blue]Neow[/blue] and heads for the top, seeking answers.
description_zh:
[blue]涅奥[/blue]复活了这具有着故障的构装体，即使对于先古之民来说，这也是了不起的成就。

[sine]“构装体... 你所.. ..失去的....
你的[red]造主[/red]... ..抛弃了你.. ...躲在..... 了... ..塔顶...”[/sine]
[blue]故障机器人[/blue]向[blue]涅奥[/blue]表达了感谢，向塔顶出发，前去寻找答案。
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]1[/blue] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[blue]故障机器人[/blue]通关[blue]第一[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Spireborn
description:
“We were but meant to survey the preliminary floors...
But it proved nothing like we expected! Such wondrous [green]wildlife[/green], [gold]curious artifacts[/gold], and even [blue]wandering traders[/blue]. From whence have these marvels arrived?

Our team seems intent on hoarding riches but at least my enthusiasm is shared by [orange]Geovan[/orange]. We have fallen [sine][red]madly in love[/red][/sine], and soon shall welcome a [pink]child[/pink] into our lives.”
description_zh:
“我们本来只是前来调查最初的几个楼层……
但得到的证据却和我们预想的完全不同！如此神奇的[green]野生动物[/green]、[gold]有趣的文物[/gold]、甚至还有[blue]游荡的商人[/blue]。这些奇妙的东西都是从哪里来的呢？

我们的小队看起来一门心思就想搜集财宝，但至少[orange]吉欧万[/orange]和我有着一样的热情。我们已经[sine][red]疯狂地坠入了爱河[/red][/sine]，很快就要迎接一个[pink]孩子[/pink]来到我们的人生中了。”
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[pink]亡灵契约师[/pink]通关[blue]第三[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked [red]Ascension[/red] for the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] and [gold]Potion of Doom[/gold], [gold]Pot of Ghouls[/gold], and [gold]Bone Brew[/gold].
unlock_text_zh: 为[pink]亡灵契约师[/pink]解锁[red]进阶难度[/red]。同时解锁[gold]灾厄药水[/gold]、[gold]尸鬼瓮[/gold]和[gold]骨头酿[/gold]。

title: Grand Strategy
description:
“Defeat!? Me!!? The [gold]Regent of Starris[/gold], does not know defeat! The [red]strange man[/red] at the top of this tower must be defeated by me and only me!”

[orange]The Regent[/orange] devises a [blue]royally brilliant plan[/blue] to become stronger. To immortalize this, it is etched into a nearby stone.

[b]T R Y     H A R D E R[/b]
description_zh:
“败北！？我！！？[gold]星国储君[/gold]的词典中没有败北！塔顶的那个[red]奇怪男人[/red]必须由我、也只能由我来打败！”

[orange]储君[/orange]想出了一个能让自己变得更强的[blue]王室级别的天才计划[/blue]。为了让这份睿智的话语能够永远流传下去，他把那句话刻在了附近的一块石头上：

[b]再  努  力  一  点[/b]
unlock_info: Beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] with the [orange]Regent[/orange] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[orange]储君[/orange]通关[blue]第三[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked [red]Ascension[/red] for the [orange]Regent[/orange] and [gold]Star Potion[/gold], [gold]Cosmic Concoction[/gold], and [gold]King's Courage[/gold].
unlock_text_zh: 为[orange]储君[/orange]解锁[red]进阶难度[/red]。同时解锁[gold]星星药水[/gold]、[gold]宇宙药剂[/gold]和[gold]王之勇气[/gold]。

title: The Giant
description:
Today marks a fantastic discovery!

A benevolent giant has agreed to guide us to the top of the Spire to meet his brother.
We believe this brother of his has the solution to stop the monsters which have been pouring out of the Spire.

This would be the greatest accomplishment of our time!
description_zh:
今天有了一次了不起的发现！

一位善良的巨人答应了会带我们前去高塔的顶端，去见他的兄弟。
我们认为他的这位兄弟，应该有办法可以阻止从高塔中涌出的怪物们。

这将会成为我们这个时代最伟大的成就！
unlock_info: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [purple]Elites[/purple] with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[pink]亡灵契约师[/pink]击杀[blue]15[/blue]个[purple]精英[/purple]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Annihilation
description:
At the top, they finally met with the [green]Giant’s[/green] brother, a [sine][red]floating man[/red][/sine]. They plead for aid but to no avail.
“Interlopers aren’t welcome.”

Only a [pink]little girl[/pink] made it out alive.
description_zh:
在塔顶，他们终于见到了[green]巨人[/green]的兄弟，那是一个[sine][red]悬浮在空中的男人[/red][/sine]。他们恳求得到帮助，却徒劳无功。
“这里不欢迎闯入者。”

只有一个[pink]小女孩[/pink]活着逃了出来。
unlock_info: Kill [blue]15[/blue] [red]Bosses[/red] with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[pink]亡灵契约师[/pink]杀死[blue]15[/blue]个[red]Boss[/red]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Darv
description:
“Spire’s reopened eh? More treasures for my collection!”

Darv smelled riches in the air and entered the Spire on his trusty steed.
description_zh:
“高塔又重新开放了啊？那我的藏品里又可以增添更多财宝咯！”

达弗嗅到了空气中的财富味道，驾着他忠实的坐骑进入了高塔。
unlock_info: Encounter all other [gold]Ancients[/gold] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 遇见其他所有[gold]先古之民[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked Ancient: [purple]Darv[/purple].
unlock_text_zh: 解锁先古之民：[purple]达弗[/purple].

title: Life and Death
description:
A [pink]young explorer[/pink] unlatched the [purple]Forbidden Grimoire[/purple]... Magics from another time and place explode outward as weightless dark smoke overwhelms this curious one.

She gains the [sine][purple]Understandings of Life and Death[/purple][/sine] — but at a cost. Her skin, hair, and organs rapidly rot away as her soul is forcefully bound into the locket in her pocket.

The Grimoire whispers, [sine][red]“If I die, you die.”[/red][/sine]
description_zh:
一个[pink]年轻的探险者[/pink]解开了[purple]禁忌魔典[/purple]的封扣……来自别个时间与地点的魔法瞬间从书中迸发出来，无数黑色轻烟笼罩了那位好奇的年轻人。

她获得了[sine][purple]对生与死的理解[/purple][/sine]——但同时也付出了代价。她的皮肤、头发与器官迅速地腐烂衰朽，而她的灵魂被强行绑缚在了她口袋中的吊坠盒上。

魔典轻声低语着：[sine][red]“若我死了，你也会死。”[/red][/sine]
unlock_info: Play a run with the [orange]Regent[/orange] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[orange]储君[/orange]进行一局游戏来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] as a playable character.
unlock_text_zh: 解锁[pink]亡灵契约师[/pink]成为一名可玩角色。

title: Little King
description:
“LITTLE KING. YOU BRIM WITH MIGHTINESS LIKE I!”
[gold]Tanx[/gold] is immediately taken with [orange]the Regent’s[/orange] regal confidence.

“DOMINATE THE SPIRE! CRUSH THEM ALL!!” he bellows, hurling a [sine]strange sceptre[/sine] toward him.

“THIS WILL LET YOU FIGHT ON EVEN GROUND!”
description_zh:
[b]“小小的王，你和我一样，散发出强大的气息！”[/b]
[gold]坦克斯[/gold]立即被[orange]储君[/orange]王者般的自信所吸引。

[b]“征服高塔！碾碎所有人！！”[/b]嵌合兽咆哮着，将一根[sine]奇怪的权杖[/sine]向他扔去。

[b]“这可以让你公平地战斗！”[/b]
unlock_info: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [orange]Regent[/orange] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 通关[red]进阶[/red][blue]1[/blue][orange]储君[/orange]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: My Face
description:
“The [gold]Spire[/gold] was mine to rule. But the Architect lives again. [jitter]Look what he's done to my FACE[/jitter].”

The Demon throws a massive fit, smashing his chamber and setting all manner of things on fire.

“My death puppet, brandish my power and kill again. [jitter]KILL THE ARCHITECT!![/jitter]”
description_zh:
“[gold]高塔[/gold]本就该是由我来统治。可是建筑师又一次活了过来。[jitter]看看他都对我的[b]脸[/b]做了什么[/jitter]。”

恶魔暴怒起来，将自己的房间砸来砸去，点燃了无数东西。

“我的死亡傀儡啊，展示我的力量，再次杀戮吧。[jitter][b]杀死建筑师！！[/b][/jitter]”
unlock_info: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [red]Ironclad[/red] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[red]铁甲战士[/red]通关[red]进阶[/red][blue]1[/blue]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: Soup
description:
[sine]“Hello, little one...!”[/sine] the massive [orange]Tezcatara[/orange] whispered to the [green]Silent[/green].

“Grow big and strong!” The Ancient speaks in a tender tone and scoots over a bowl of nutritious [sine]soup[/sine].
description_zh:
[sine]“你好啊，小家伙……！”[/sine]巨大的[orange]特兹卡塔拉[/orange]向着[green]静默猎手[/green]低语。

“要长得又高又壮哦！”这位先古之民用温柔的语气说着，把一碗营养丰富的[sine]汤[/sine]推了过去。
unlock_info: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [green]Silent[/green] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[green]静默猎手[/green]通关[red]进阶[/red][blue]1[/blue]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: The Daily
description: A being of immense power exercises his mastery of form and space once a day, shifting the very nature of the [gold]Spire[/gold].
description_zh: 一个拥有巨大力量的存在，每天一次施展着它对于空间与形态的掌控，改变着[gold]高塔[/gold]的本质。
unlock_info: Play a single run with all characters and beat [gold]Act[/gold] [blue]3[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 用所有角色通关[blue]第三[/blue][gold]阶段[/gold]来揭示这个历史节点。
unlock_text: Unlocked game mode: Daily.
unlock_text_zh: 解锁游戏模式：每日挑战。

title: Ooh Shiny!
description:
The [blue]Defect[/blue] entered a disorderly chamber filled with [gold]treasures[/gold], [green]trinkets[/green], [red]weapons[/red], [blue]exotic animals[/blue], [orange]art pieces[/orange], [purple]books[/purple], and all manner of [sine]junk and doodads[/rainbow][/sine].

The amount of disorder and information is overwhelming for the poor [blue]Defect’s[/blue] processing core.

[jitter]“Outta tha way!”[/jitter] Shouts a megafaunal humanoid riding a threat-level: 9 reptile, but then stops in its tracks and turns to the [blue]Defect[/blue] with a [sine]strange grin[/sine].

“I've got somethin' for ya!”
description_zh:
[blue]故障机器人[/blue]进入了一个房间，里面胡乱摆放着众多[gold]财宝[/gold]、[green]饰品[/green]、[red]武器[/red]、[blue]珍稀动物[/blue]、[orange]艺术品[/orange]、[purple]书籍[/purple]以及各种各样[sine]垃圾与小物件[/rainbow][/sine]，挤得满满当当。

如此大量的信息与无序规模让[blue]故障机器人[/blue]可怜的处理核心一时有些无法承受。

[jitter]“别挡道哈！”[/jitter]一个骑着一条威胁等级9级爬行动物的巨大人形生物高声呼喊着，但它随即停下坐骑，露出[sine]奇怪的微笑[/sine]看向了[blue]故障机器人[/blue]。

“我有东西给你哦！”
unlock_info: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [blue]Defect[/blue] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[blue]故障机器人[/blue]通关[red]进阶[/red][blue]1[/blue]来揭示这个历史节点。

title: To Kill
description:
The [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] faced off against the [red]Architect[/red] and demands the restoration of the [green]Giant[/green], her parents, her humanity. She’s [jitter]blazing with vengeance[/jitter] but is annihilated again and again.

On one of her ascents, she discovers a massive dragon, [gold]Pael[/gold]. Giving off the same gentle presence as the [green]Giant[/green], he speaks...

“This will help you get his attention...”
description_zh:
[pink]亡灵契约师[/pink]来到[red]建筑师[/red]面前，要求他复原[green]巨人[/green]、她的父母和她的人性。她[jitter]因为复仇而愤怒[/jitter]，可是却一次又一次地被消灭。

在一次攀登的途中，她发现了一条巨大的龙，[gold]佩尔[/gold]。巨龙散发出与[green]相同[/green]的温柔气息，他开口说……

“这能帮助你引起他的注意……”
unlock_info: Beat [red]Ascension[/red] [blue]1[/blue] with the [pink]Necrobinder[/pink] to reveal this Epoch.
unlock_info_zh: 以[pink]亡灵契约师[/pink]通关[red]进阶[/red][blue]1[/blue]来揭示这个历史节点。
